description_long: This stool features a rectangular, slightly rounded seat upholstered in a warm ochre or mustard-yellow fabric with a subtle texture. The seat is supported by four splayed, black metal legs that provide stability and a modern aesthetic. The legs are connected by two horizontal crossbars, one on each side, enhancing structural integrity and adding a geometric element to the design. The stool lacks a backrest and armrests, emphasizing its minimalist and functional form. Its compact size and clean lines make it suitable for urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or public waiting areas. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on comfort and durability.
description: A modern, rectangular stool with a mustard-yellow upholstered seat and black metal splayed legs, featuring crossbars for added stability. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the mustard-yellow seat and the splayed black legs with visible crossbar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the seat and the angled black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the seat and the opposite crossbar between the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim seat and the splayed leg arrangement.
